methodology.return_definition: simple close-to-close returns computed inside each window; cumulative return is last_close / first_close - 1 and does not bridge window boundaries
methodology.realized_volatility_definition: sample standard deviation of log close-to-close returns, annualized by sqrt(8760) for 1h and sqrt(2190) for 4h
methodology.volume_definition: raw base-unit volume quantiles plus close*volume quote-notional proxy quantiles; cross-asset volume rankings use the quote-notional proxy
methodology.ranking_definition: descending across BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP for each window and timeframe; deterministic alphabetical tie break
methodology.stability_definition: for each BNB/XRP versus BTC/ETH comparison across the four frozen slices, stable majority means the same above/below relation in at least 3 of 4 slices; adjacent flips count changes among non-tie relations
methodology.four_hour_slice_assignment: include a 4h candle when its timestamp is within [slice_start, slice_end_exclusive); returns are computed only within the selected candles
